message:
style: fix clippy warnings across analysis and export modules

- cache.rs: replace redundant closure with PoisonError::into_inner
- suggest.rs: replace closure with f64::total_cmp method reference
- triage.rs: replace closure with Issue::is_open_like method reference
- pages_wizard.rs: replace map_or with is_none_or for Option checks
- export_pages.rs: remove redundant clone on resolved_path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -591,7 +591,7 @@ pub fn compute_triage(
         let unblocks_ids: Vec<String> = graph
             .dependents(&issue.id)
             .into_iter()
-            .filter(|dep_id| graph.issue(dep_id).is_some_and(|dep| dep.is_open_like()))
+            .filter(|dep_id| graph.issue(dep_id).is_some_and(Issue::is_open_like))
             .collect();
 
         let action = if !open_blocker_ids.is_empty() {
